title: dianthus × saxatilis nothosubsp. saxatilis
intro: Dianthus × saxatilis nothosubsp. saxatilis, commonly known as saxatile carnation, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of saxatile carnation include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Saxatile carnation can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
